prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small cyan metal cube
  - obj_1: small purple rubber sphere
  - obj_2: small brown rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: large cyan metal sphere
  - obj_4: large gray metal cube
  - obj_5: small green metal sphere
  - obj_6: large green rubber sphere
  - obj_7: small blue metal sphere
  - obj_8: large brown metal cube
  - obj_9: small cyan rubber cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0301] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0302] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0303] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0304] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0305] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0306] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0307] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0308] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0309] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0310] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0311] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0312] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0313] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0314] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0315] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0316] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0317] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0318] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0319] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0320] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the scene and compare distances between pairs of objects.

Let me first estimate the positions of each object based on the image:

- obj_0 (small cyan metal cube): far right, middle height
- obj_1 (small purple rubber sphere): left-center area
- obj_2 (small brown rubber cylinder): left area, behind purple sphere
- obj_3 (large cyan metal sphere): center-front area
- obj_4 (large gray metal cube): center-back area
- obj_5 (small green metal sphere): front-right area
- obj_6 (large green rubber sphere): back-right area
- obj_7 (small blue metal sphere): far left
- obj_8 (large brown metal cube): center area
- obj_9 (small cyan rubber cylinder): front-left area

Let me estimate approximate coordinates (x, y, z):
- obj_0 (cyan metal cube): (8, 1, -2)
- obj_1 (purple sphere): (-1, 0, 0)
- obj_2 (brown rubber cylinder): (-3, 0, -1)
- obj_3 (large cyan sphere): (2, 0, 3)
- obj_4 (gray metal cube): (3, 1, -2)
- obj_5 (green metal sphere): (5, 0, 4)
- obj_6 (large green rubber sphere): (5, 1, -4)
- obj_7 (blue metal sphere): (-6, 0, 0)
- obj_8 (large brown metal cube): (1, 1, 0)
- obj_9 (cyan rubber cylinder): (-1, 0, 3)

Distance obj_1 to obj_5: sqrt((5-(-1))²+(4-0)²) = sqrt(36+16) = sqrt(52) ≈ 7.2

Now let me compute each comparison:

[qrr_0301] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_2-obj_8: obj_2-obj_8: sqrt((1-(-3))²+(0-(-1))²) = sqrt(16+1) ≈ 4.1. So 7.2 > 4.1 → ">"
[qrr_0302] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_2-obj_9: sqrt((-1-(-3))²+(3-(-1))²) = sqrt(4+16) ≈ 4.5. 7.2 > 4.5 → ">"
[qrr_0303] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_3-obj_4: sqrt((3-2)²+(-2-(-2))²+(?) ≈ sqrt(1+16+25) ≈ sqrt(26) ≈ 5.1 in 3D. 7.2 > 5.1 → ">"
[qrr_0304] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_3-obj_6: sqrt((5-2)²+(-4-3)²) ≈ sqrt(9+49) ≈ 7.6. 7.2 < 7.6 → "<"
[qrr_0305] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_3-obj_7: sqrt((2-(-6))²+(3-0)²) = sqrt(64+9) ≈ 8.5. 7.2 < 8.5 → "<"
[qrr_0306] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_3-obj_8: sqrt((1-2)²+(0-3)²) = sqrt(1+9) ≈ 3.2. 7.2 > 3.2 → ">"
[qrr_0307] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_3-obj_9: sqrt((-1-2)²+(3-3)²) ≈ 3. 7.2 > 3 → ">"
[qrr_0308] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_4-obj_6: sqrt((5-3)²+(-4-(-2))²) ≈ sqrt(4+4+larger z) ≈ sqrt(4+36) ≈ 6.3. 7.2 > 6.3 → ">"
[qrr_0309] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_4-obj_7: sqrt((3-(-6))²) ≈ sqrt(81+4) ≈ 9.2. 7.2 < 9.2 → "<"
[qrr_0310] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_4-obj_8: sqrt((1-3)²+(0-(-2))²) ≈ sqrt(4+4) ≈ 2.8. 7.2 > 2.8 → ">"
[qrr_0311] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_4-obj_9: sqrt((-1-3)²+(3-(-2))²) ≈ sqrt(16+25) ≈ 6.4. 7.2 > 6.4 → ">"
[qrr_0312] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_6-obj_7: sqrt((5-(-6))²+(-4-0)²) ≈ sqrt(121+16) ≈ 11.7. 7.2 < 11.7 → "<"
[qrr_0313] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_6-obj_8: sqrt((1-5)²+(0-(-4))²) ≈ sqrt(16+16) ≈ 5.7. 7.2 > 5.7 → ">"
[qrr_0314] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_6-obj_9: sqrt((-1-5)²+(3-(-4))²) ≈ sqrt(36+49) ≈ 9.2. 7.2 < 9.2 → "<"
[qrr_0315] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_7-obj_8: sqrt((1-(-6))²) ≈ sqrt(49+1) ≈ 7.1. 7.2 ~= 7.1 → "~="
[qrr_0316] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_7-obj_9: sqrt((-1-(-6))²+(3-0)²) = sqrt(25+9) ≈ 5.8. 7.2 > 5.8 → ">"
[qrr_0317] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_8-obj_9: sqrt((-1-1)²+(3-0)²) ≈ sqrt(4+9) ≈ 3.6. 7.2 > 3.6 → ">"
[qrr_0318] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_3: obj_1-obj_6: sqrt((-1-5)²+(0-(-4))²) ≈ sqrt(36+16) ≈ 7.2. obj_2-obj_3: sqrt((2-(-3))²+(3-(-1))²) ≈ sqrt(25+16) ≈ 6.4. 7.2 > 6.4 → ">"
[qrr_0319] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_4: obj_2-obj_4: sqrt((3-(-3))²+(-2-(-1))²) ≈ sqrt(36+1) ≈ 6.1. 7.2 > 6.1 → ">"
[qrr_0320] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_7: obj_2-obj_7: sqrt((-6-(-3))²+(0-(-1))²) = sqrt(9+1) ≈ 3.2. 7.2 > 3.2 → ">"
